before.bottleneck: _create_baseline: 3 redundant file-system passes (discover_files + analyze_repo + ParseCache.file_hash * 1000 + pcache.get * 1000)

after.redundant_io_eliminated: ~2000 file reads (1000 file_hash + 1000 pcache.get JSON reads)

changes.change: Added file_hashes_out: dict[str, str] | None = None parameter to AnalysisPipeline.run(); populates it from parsed.file_hashes after ingestion phase
Refactored _create_baseline(): removed standalone discover_files() + entire 3rd-pass I/O loop; uses file_hashes_out to get hashes from pipeline in one pass; parse_map={}  (same as disk warm-load)

correctness_proof: Empty parse_map matches BaselineManager._load_persisted_nudge_baseline() behavior; IncrementalSignalRunner.run() handles {} correctly (already validated by disk-warm path)
precision_recall_impact: none — signal execution logic unchanged; only baseline construction I/O is affected
